::: {.aagi-titlepage}
<!-- Primary logo -->
![](_extensions/aagi/assets/AAGI_logo.svg){.aagi-logo}

:::: {.aagi-title-block}
**Analytics for the Australian Grains Industry**  
**`r uni_name` (AAGI-`r params$uni`)**  
**AAGI Program Report**

# `r params$report_title`

## Technical Report

`r if (!is.null(params$report_number)) sprintf('Report no. %s', params$report_number) else ''` `r if (!is.null(params$report_version)) sprintf(' — version %s', params$report_version) else ''`

**Project code:** `r params$project_code`

<!-- Authors: prefer params$authors (list) if present, otherwise fallback to params$aagi_staff -->
**Authors:** `r if (!is.null(params$authors)) paste(params$authors, collapse = ", ") else params$aagi_staff`

**Prepared for:** `r params$partner` (`r params$partner_email`)  
**Prepared by:** AAGI — `r params$aagi_staff`  
**Correspondence:** <`r aagi_email`>

**Date:** `r format(Sys.Date(), "%B %Y")`  
`r if (!is.null(params$report_date) && nzchar(params$report_date)) sprintf('Report date: %s', params$report_date) else ''`

`r if (!is.null(params$abstract) && nzchar(params$abstract)) paste0('\n\n**Abstract.** ', params$abstract) else ''`
::::

<!-- Partner and supporter logos -->
![](_extensions/aagi/assets/AAGI_SP_Logo_Block-Portrait.png){.aagi-partners}

:::: {.aagi-meta}
`r if (!is.null(params$doi)) paste0('DOI: ', params$doi) else ''`  
`r if (!is.null(params$repo_url)) paste0('Repository: ', params$repo_url) else ''`  
`r if (!is.null(params$license)) paste0('License: ', params$license) else ''`
::::
:::
